design_plan: RNG(seed=42): select comparison-page architecture; AIDA passed (Attention hero, Interest workflow pain, Desire cache advantage, Action CTAs). Hero math: 68 chars/line -> 2–3 lines @1120px. Bento density verified via grid-auto-flow:dense. Label sweep: creators/coaches language, no invented pricing. Button contrast checked (ink/white pills).
headline: Super for creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations

site_brief.audience: creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work.
queries: creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations AI assistant
creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations

summary: A conversion-focused niche landing page that reuses Super’s best comparison-page visual system to show creators and coaches how a personal AI agent can operate real apps, turn conversations into assets, and reuse a computer-use cache for faster, cheaper repeated workflows—positioned clearly against ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok, Siri, Folk, and Orchids.
